name: s1-leaf1
description: Verifies there is no difference between the running-config and the startup-config.
messages:
--- flash:/startup-config
+++ system:/running-config
@@ -8,6 +8,9 @@
 !
 management api http-commands
    no shutdown
+   !
+   vrf default
+      no shutdown
 !
 daemon TerminAttr
    exec /usr/bin/TerminAttr -cvcompression=gzip -smashexcludes=ale,flexCounter,hardware,kni,pulse,strata -ingestexclude=/Sysdb/cell/1/agent,/Sysdb/cell/2/agent -cvaddr=192.168.0.5:9910 -cvauth=token,/tmp/token -cvvrf=default -taillogs -disableaaa

name: s1-leaf1
description: Verifies there are no syslog messages with a severity of ERRORS or higher.
messages:
Device has reported syslog messages with a severity of ERRORS or higher:
Jul 10 02:38:47 3b006ad3b2a5 NorCalInit: %HARDWARE-0-SYSTEM_IDENTIFICATION_FAILED: Failed to identify this system

name: s1-leaf1
description: Verifies that no partition is utilizing more than 75% of its disk space.
messages: Mount point: overlay          60G   45G   15G  76% / - Higher disk space utilization - Expected: 75% Actual: 76%
Mount point: /dev/sda2        60G   45G   15G  76% /mnt/flash - Higher disk space utilization - Expected: 75% Actual: 76%

name: s1-leaf1
description: Verifies whether the memory utilization is below 75%.
messages: Device has reported a high memory usage - Expected: < 75% Actual: 85.87%
